query:
-- Encerrar preço do gian vinculado ao responsável antigo (30001)
UPDATE billing_doctor_unit_prices 
SET ends_at = '2026-05-18 00:00:00'
WHERE financial_responsible_id = 30001 AND unit_id = 210001 AND doctor_user_id = 5520015 AND ends_at IS NULL;

-- Criar preço do gian para o novo responsável (120001)
INSERT INTO billing_doctor_unit_prices (financial_responsible_id, unit_id, doctor_user_id, price_per_report, starts_at, ends_at, created_by, createdAt)
VALUES (120001, 210001, 5520015, '6.50', '2026-05-18 00:00:00', NULL, 1, NOW());
